name: oh-my-openkei
description: Lightweight agent orchestration plugin for OpenCode - a slimmed-down fork of oh-my-opencode

scripts.build:plugin: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external @ast-grep/napi --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk --external jsdom --external zod
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target node --format esm --external @ast-grep/napi --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk --external jsdom --external zod
scripts.build: bun run build:plugin && bun run build:cli && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && bun run generate-schema
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
